title.en: Gigabit Wi-Fi: VHT Wide Channels, 256-QAM and Downlink MU-MIMO in 802.11ac
title.zh: 千兆 Wi-Fi：802.11ac 的 VHT 宽信道、256-QAM 与下行 MU-MIMO

blocks.en: 802.11ac — the Very High Throughput (VHT) PHY — chased gigabit speeds in the cleaner, roomier 5 GHz band, and it got there by pulling three levers at once. Make the channel wider, so more spectrum carries data. Pack more bits into each subcarrier, so every symbol says more. And let one access point talk to several clients at the same instant instead of taking turns. None of these is magic on its own, but stacked together they turn a 5 GHz link into a multi-hundred-megabit — and on a good day gigabit — pipe.
blocks.zh: 802.11ac——也就是甚高吞吐量（VHT）物理层——把目标对准了更干净、更宽敞的 5 GHz 频段里的千兆速率，并且同时拉动了三根杠杆。把信道变宽，让更多频谱来承载数据；在每个子载波里塞进更多比特，让每个符号承载更多信息；再让一个接入点在同一瞬间同时与多个客户端通话，而不是轮流来。单独看，这三招都不算魔法，但叠加在一起，就把一条 5 GHz 链路变成了几百兆、状态好时甚至上千兆的管道。

blocks.en: Lever one is bandwidth. Where the earlier HT (802.11n) PHY topped out at 40 MHz, VHT keeps 20 and 40 MHz but adds 80 MHz and 160 MHz channels. 160 MHz comes in two flavours: one contiguous 160 MHz block, or 80+80 MHz — two separate 80 MHz segments stitched together, useful when no single clean 160 MHz slot exists. A wider channel is simply more parallel subcarriers, so doubling the width roughly doubles the raw rate. The catch: clean 80/160 MHz space really only exists at 5 GHz, which is exactly why VHT lives there.
blocks.zh: 第一根杠杆是带宽。早先的 HT（802.11n）物理层最高只到 40 MHz，而 VHT 在保留 20 和 40 MHz 的同时，新增了 80 MHz 与 160 MHz 信道。160 MHz 有两种形态：一整块连续的 160 MHz，或者 80+80 MHz——把两段独立的 80 MHz 拼接起来，在找不到单独一块干净 160 MHz 时很有用。更宽的信道无非就是更多并行的子载波，所以把带宽翻一倍，原始速率也大致翻一倍。代价是：真正干净的 80/160 MHz 空间几乎只存在于 5 GHz，这正是 VHT 落户于此的原因。

blocks.en: Lever two is denser modulation. VHT adds 256-QAM, where each subcarrier carries one of 256 constellation points — 8 bits per subcarrier, versus 6 bits for the 64-QAM that 802.11n stopped at. That is a 33% jump in bits per symbol for free... except it isn't free. With 256 points crammed into the same I/Q plane, the dots sit very close together, so the receiver needs a very clean signal — a high SNR — to tell them apart. This makes the rate-vs-range trade-off vivid: 256-QAM (the new top rates, MCS 8 and 9) only works close to the AP where the signal is strong; walk away and the link gracefully drops back to 64-QAM, then 16-QAM, then QPSK.
blocks.zh: 第二根杠杆是更密的调制。VHT 新增了 256-QAM：每个子载波承载 256 个星座点之一——也就是每子载波 8 比特，而 802.11n 止步的 64-QAM 只有 6 比特。这相当于每符号比特数白白涨了 33%……只是它并不“白白”。把 256 个点挤进同一个 I/Q 平面后，这些点彼此靠得非常近，接收机需要一个非常干净的信号——很高的信噪比（SNR）——才能把它们区分开。于是“速率与距离”的权衡变得格外直观：256-QAM（新增的最高速率档 MCS 8 和 9）只有在离 AP 很近、信号很强时才管用；一旦走远，链路会优雅地回落到 64-QAM，再到 16-QAM，再到 QPSK。

blocks.en: Lever three is the conceptual leap: downlink multi-user MIMO (DL MU-MIMO). A multi-antenna AP can send distinct spatial streams to several clients simultaneously, sculpting the radio energy so each client mostly hears its own streams and the others arrive as suppressed crosstalk. The standard distinguishes a VHT SU PPDU (group ID 0 or 63, one recipient) from a VHT MU PPDU (group ID 1–62, up to four users at once). Instead of the AP servicing clients one PPDU at a time, a single down-link transmission now feeds a small group — a real multiplier on busy networks.
blocks.zh: 第三根杠杆是观念上的飞跃：下行多用户 MIMO（DL MU-MIMO）。一个多天线 AP 可以同时向多个客户端发送各自不同的空间流，通过塑形射频能量，让每个客户端主要听到属于自己的那些流，而别人的流则以被抑制的串扰形式到达。标准区分了 VHT SU PPDU（组 ID 为 0 或 63，单个接收者）与 VHT MU PPDU（组 ID 为 1–62，最多同时四个用户）。AP 不再一次只为一个客户端发一个 PPDU，单次下行传输如今就能喂饱一小组客户端——在繁忙网络里这是实打实的倍增器。

blocks.en: MU-MIMO needs the AP to know the channel first. The AP sends a null-data-packet (NDP) sounding frame; each client measures the channel and sends back a compressed beamforming feedback matrix V (angles, not raw numbers, to save air time). From these the AP computes a per-user steering matrix Q that aims energy at each receiver while nulling the others. No fresh sounding, no trustworthy steering — so MU-MIMO gains decay as soon as clients move.
blocks.zh: MU-MIMO 要求 AP 先“摸清”信道。AP 发出一个空数据包（NDP）探测帧；每个客户端测量信道，并回传一个压缩的波束成形反馈矩阵 V（回传的是角度而非原始数值，以节省空口时间）。AP 据此为每个用户计算一个导向矩阵 Q，把能量瞄向各自的接收机，同时对其他人置零。没有新鲜的探测，就没有可靠的导向——所以一旦客户端移动，MU-MIMO 的增益就会衰减。

caption.en: Downlink MU-MIMO: one VHT MU PPDU, distinct spatial streams steered to three stations at once. Each beam peaks at its own client and is nulled toward the others.
caption.zh: 下行 MU-MIMO：一个 VHT MU PPDU，把不同的空间流同时导向三个站点。每束波在自己的客户端处达到峰值，对其他人则被置零。

summary.en: How VHT-SIG-A, 256-QAM and the sounding loop are actually specified
summary.zh: VHT-SIG-A、256-QAM 与探测环路在标准中的精确规定

blocks.en: The VHT PPDU defines a single format whose VHT-specific fields (VHT-SIG-A, VHT-STF, VHT-LTF, VHT-SIG-B) follow a legacy-decodable preamble (21.3.2). VHT-SIG-A is two 24-bit parts: VHT-SIG-A1 carries BW (B0-B1: 0=20, 1=40, 2=80, 3=160/80+80 MHz), STBC, the Group ID (B4-B9; 0 or 63 = SU, 1-62 = MU), and the NSTS/Partial-AID field; VHT-SIG-A2 carries Short GI, coding, the SU VHT-MCS (or per-user MU coding) and the Beamformed bit (21.3.8.3.3). The wider rates come from 256-QAM constellation mapping (21.3.10.9), whose 8-bits/subcarrier density is what forces the high-SNR, short-range behaviour. MU-MIMO steering is built from sounding: on receiving a VHT NDP the beamformee removes the per-stream CSD, compresses V into quantised angles via the 19.3.12.3.6 method, and feeds them back; the beamformer reconstructs Vk,u and computes the per-user steering matrix Qk,u (method implementation-specific) to suppress inter-user crosstalk (21.3.11.1-21.3.11.2). Channel width itself is set by the PLME MIB fields dot11CurrentChannelWidth plus center-frequency indices, with 80+80 MHz using two segment indices (21.3.14).
blocks.zh: VHT PPDU 只定义了一种格式，其 VHT 专属字段（VHT-SIG-A、VHT-STF、VHT-LTF、VHT-SIG-B）跟在一段可被传统设备解码的前导之后（21.3.2）。VHT-SIG-A 由两个 24 比特部分组成：VHT-SIG-A1 携带带宽（B0-B1：0=20、1=40、2=80、3=160/80+80 MHz）、STBC、组 ID（B4-B9；0 或 63 为 SU，1-62 为 MU）以及 NSTS/部分 AID 字段；VHT-SIG-A2 携带短保护间隔、编码、SU VHT-MCS（或逐用户 MU 编码）以及 Beamformed 比特（21.3.8.3.3）。更高的速率来自 256-QAM 星座映射（21.3.10.9），其每子载波 8 比特的密度正是迫使其需要高 SNR、只能近距离工作的原因。MU-MIMO 的导向建立在探测之上：收到 VHT NDP 后，波束成形对端（beamformee）先移除逐流 CSD，按 19.3.12.3.6 的方法把 V 压缩为量化角度并回传；波束成形端（beamformer）重建 Vk,u 并计算逐用户导向矩阵 Qk,u（具体方法由实现决定），以抑制用户间串扰（21.3.11.1-21.3.11.2）。信道宽度本身由 PLME MIB 字段 dot11CurrentChannelWidth 加上中心频率索引设定，其中 80+80 MHz 使用两个频段索引（21.3.14）。
